Our Pest Control Services

Professional pest control solutions tailored to your needs.

Termite Inspection & Treatment

Comprehensive protection against Tampa's destructive subterranean and drywood termites.

Learn More →

Rodent Exclusion

Complete solutions to keep rats and mice out of Tampa Bay homes year-round.

Learn More →

Mosquito Misting Systems

Automatic protection from Tampa's mosquitoes so you can enjoy your outdoor spaces.

Learn More →

Bed Bug Treatment

Discreet, thorough elimination of bed bugs from Tampa homes and apartments.

Learn More →

Palmetto Bug Control

Year-round solutions for Florida's notorious palmetto bugs and cockroaches.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our pest control services.

How often should Tampa homes be inspected for termites?

We recommend annual inspections for most Tampa properties, but bi-annual checks for older homes or those with previous infestations. The humid climate accelerates termite activity compared to drier regions.

Do I need treatment if I don't see termites?

Yes - by the time you spot visible signs, damage may already be extensive. Our preventative barriers stop colonies before they reach your home, particularly important for Florida's aggressive subterranean species.

Reviews From Our Pest Control Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"After finding termite damage in our 1930s Seminole Heights bungalow, Summit identified issues we'd missed for years. Their technician spotted telltale mud tubes behind our original baseboards and recommended targeted treatment that saved our historic wood floors. Two years later, still termite-free!"

Sarah J. Termite Inspection

"Living near Bayshore, we battled rats every winter. Summit sealed every possible entry point in our 1970s ranch, including clever solutions for our older garage. They even found where rodents were climbing palm trees to access our roof. Haven't seen a single rodent since their work last fall."

Marcus T. Rodent Exclusion

"Our backyard near the Hillsborough River was unusable evenings due to mosquitoes. Summit installed a misting system that blends perfectly with our landscaping. Now we actually enjoy our pool area at sunset - worth every penny in mosquito-heavy Tampa summers."

Elena R. Mosquito Misting System
